name: AdversaryIndex
description: Live AI adversarial threat index. Attack success rates, new techniques, defense efficacy, and compliance risk scores across foundation models, updated hourly.

distribution.name: AdversaryIndex Latest JSON
distribution.description: Full adversarial threat dataset in JSON format, updated hourly

distribution.name: AdversaryIndex Latest CSV
distribution.description: Full adversarial threat dataset in CSV format, updated hourly

prov:wasGeneratedBy.name: AdversaryIndex Data Collection
prov:wasGeneratedBy.description: Automated collection of adversarial attack data, defense metrics, and compliance risk scores from public research and model testing

prov:used.name: Model Security Testing APIs
prov:used.description: Direct adversarial testing results from foundation model providers

prov:used.name: Public Vulnerability Databases
prov:used.description: CVE and adversarial ML vulnerability disclosures

knownLimitations: Attack success rates depend on specific model versions and may change with updates
Defense efficacy scores are point-in-time assessments
New attack vectors may not be immediately cataloged
Compliance mappings are advisory and not legal guidance

ethicsAndResponsibleUse.biasConsiderations: Coverage weighted toward major foundation models. Smaller or proprietary models may be underrepresented.
ethicsAndResponsibleUse.intendedBeneficiaries: Security teams, red teamers, researchers, AI systems needing adversarial threat intelligence
